ItacAcademyItem.Name: Assicurate (Accademia delle)
ItacAcademyItem.Motto: qui ne difende e qui ne illustra l`ombra

ItacPersonItem.Name: della Rovere Medici,Vittoria,Grand Duchess of Tuscany,1621-?

ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
